steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The blank separates an independent clause — “It explores how Indigenous Haudenosaunee culture shaped the woman suffrage movement in the early nineteenth century” — from a participial phrase — “revealing how the personal and political authority Haudenosaunee women had in their communities influenced the first suffragists in the US.”

steps.title: Apply the comma rule for trailing participial phrases
steps.content: A comma precedes a trailing participial phrase that modifies an independent clause; (C) correctly uses this punctuation. (A) and (B) employ incorrect punctuation (a period and a semicolon, respectively), and (D) omits the required comma. That matches choice C — C is correct.
